tasks.title: Fix Currency & i18n Issues
tasks.description: Replace all $ signs with ৳ (BD Taka) across admin web and add centralized currency formatter utility. Also standardize date formatting to dd/MM/yyyy for BD locale.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. Manual visual check: visit Dashboard, POS, Sales pages — verify all amounts show ৳ with correct formatting.
2. Unit test for formatCurrency: check that 500 becomes '৳500.00', 1000.50 becomes '৳1,000.50'.
3. Unit test for formatDate: check that new Date('2026-05-01') returns '01/05/2026'.
4. Regression: ensure components using currency formatting still render properly.

tasks.title: Fix Auth & Security Issues
tasks.description: Move /pos route inside AuthGuard, wire logout button functionality, add error boundary component wrapping Routes, and implement session expiry redirect.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual test**: Open /pos in incognito without login → should redirect to /login.
2. **Manual test**: Click logout button → should sign out and redirect to login.
3. **Manual test**: Trigger a crash in a component (e.g., render undefined) → error boundary should show fallback UI, not white screen.
4. **Edge case**: Open /pos while authenticated → should render normally.

tasks.title: Unify Styling & Clean Dead Code
tasks.description: Unify styling across the admin web by converting dark-themed pages (Collections, Ledger) to use design tokens, remove all inline styles in favor of Tailwind classes, and delete dead POS components and stray files.
tasks.details:
1. **Style unification**:
   - In `apps/admin_web/src/pages/collections/index.tsx`, replace all `bg-white/5`, `text-white/50` and similar dark-theme classes with light-theme Tailwind equivalents (e.g., `bg-white`, `text-gray-700`).
   - Same for `apps/admin_web/src/pages/customer-ledger.tsx` and `supplier-ledger.tsx`.
   - Use CSS variables from design tokens (likely defined in `tailwind.config.js` or a `tokens.css`). Example: `bg-primary`, `text-secondary`.
   - Search all .tsx files for `style={{` and replace with Tailwind classes. If complex dynamic styles exist, extract to CSS module or use Tailwind's `classnames` utility.

2. **Delete dead POS components**:
   - Delete `apps/admin_web/src/components/pos/BillingPanel.tsx`
   - Delete `apps/admin_web/src/components/pos/ProductCard.tsx`
   - Delete `apps/admin_web/src/components/pos/CategoryPill.tsx`
   - Delete `apps/admin_web/src/components/pos/QuantityStepper.tsx`
   - Update any imports that reference these (QuickPosPage shouldn't use them).

3. **Delete stray files**:
   - Remove `apps/admin_web/data/my.karbarapp.com-Karbar-cvscreenshot (3).jpeg`
   - Delete all `*.stories.tsx` files (unused Storybook stories).

4. **POS inline styles**: Extract QuickPosPage's inline styles into a CSS module `apps/admin_web/src/pages/pos/QuickPosPage.module.css`.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Visual regression**: Manually visit Collections, Customer Ledger, Supplier Ledger pages — verify they now use light theme consistently with rest of app.
2. **Visual regression**: Check QuickPosPage render — no missing styles, layout unchanged.
3. **Build check**: Ensure app compiles without errors after file deletions.
4. **Manual check**: Navigate to all pages and ensure nothing is broken due to style changes.

tasks.title: Implement Loading & Empty States
tasks.description: Add consistent skeleton loaders, empty state illustrations, and error states with retry buttons across all pages (products, sales, inventory, customers, etc.).
tasks.details:
1. **Create reusable components** in `apps/admin_web/src/components/ui/`:
   - `Skeleton.tsx`: A simple skeleton loader with configurable width/height.
   - `EmptyState.tsx`: Takes an illustration name (e.g., 'products', 'sales', 'customers') and a message, renders an SVG illustration + text.
   - `ErrorState.tsx`: Shows error message + 'Retry' button that accepts an `onRetry` callback.

2. **Integrate into pages**:
   - For each list page (Products, Sales, Inventory), add:
     ```tsx
     const { data, isLoading, error, refetch } = useQuery(...);
     if (isLoading) return <Skeleton count={10} />;
     if (error) return <ErrorState message={error.message} onRetry={refetch} />;
     if (!data?.length) return <EmptyState type="products" message="No products found" />;
     ```
   - Pages to update: Products, Sales, Inventory, Customers, Suppliers, Collections, Expenses, Reminders.

3. **Skeleton pattern**: Create a page-level skeleton that matches the list layout (e.g., table rows or card grid with shimmer effect).
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Unit test**: Render EmptyState with different types — verify correct illustration and message appear.
2. **Manual test**: Visit an empty page (e.g., no sales yet) — should show empty state illustration, not a blank table.
3. **Manual test**: Simulate API failure by stopping Supabase locally — error state with retry button should appear.
4. **Edge case**: Very long list still shows skeleton while loading.

tasks.title: Implement Responsive POS Layout & Sale Completion UX
tasks.description: Make POS page responsive for mobile/tablet with touch-friendly UI, add receipt preview modal after sale, auto-clear cart, hold/recall cart functionality, and improved payment flow with split payment support.
tasks.details:
1. **Responsive POS layout**: - In `QuickPosPage`, add media queries or Tailwind responsive classes: ```tsx
...
...
``` - On mobile (< md breakpoint): show product list full-width by default, cart in a slide-up sheet triggered by a floating cart icon button. - Ensure buttons have `min-h-[48px]` and `min-w-[48px]` for touch targets. - Sticky cart summary at bottom on mobile: `fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0`. 2. **Receipt preview modal**: - Create `apps/admin_web/src/components/pos/ReceiptPreview.tsx`: ```tsx const ReceiptPreview = ({ sale }: { sale: Sale }) => { return (

{storeName}

{sale.date}

{sale.items.map(item => (
{item.name} x{item.qty} {formatCurrency(item.total)}
))}
Total {formatCurrency(sale.total)}
); }; export default ReceiptPreview; ``` - After successful checkout, show a modal containing the receipt with a print button. - Print button calls `window.print()` with print CSS that hides everything but `.paper-58mm`. 3. **Sale completion UX**: - After checkout success: show toast notification with sale number, auto-clear cart state, show "New Sale" button. - Implement hold/recall: add a `button` to park current cart (save to local storage or API). "Recall" button shows list of parked sales to resume. 4. **Payment improvements**: - Add quick amount buttons (100, 500, 1000, Exact) next to the custom amount input. - Allow adding multiple payment methods: `{ method: 'cash', amount: 300 }, { method: 'bKash', amount: 200 }` in one transaction. - Display change calculation: `change = totalPaid - totalAmount`. - Add bKang/SSLCommerz integration status indicator (e.g., green dot if connected).
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual responsive test**: Open POS page at different viewport widths (mobile 375px, tablet 768px, desktop 1440px) — verify layout adapts correctly.
2. **Manual test**: Complete a sale → receipt modal appears → click print → print dialog opens with receipt formatting.
3. **Manual test**: Park a sale (hold) → navigate away → recall → cart restores with same items.
4. **Manual test**: Split payment: enter 300 cash + 200 bKash → total = 500 → sale completes.
5. **Edge case**: Try to checkout with empty cart → button disabled with tooltip.
6. **Edge case**: Hold multiple sales → recall list shows all.

tasks.title: Wire Settings Buttons & Add Missing Pages (Expenses, Reminders)
tasks.description: Make Settings Add User and Add Payment Method buttons functional by connecting to existing Supabase RPCs. Create Expense Tracking and Reminders pages with full CRUD UI.
tasks.details:
1. **Settings: Add User**:
   - In `apps/admin_web/src/pages/settings/index.tsx`, find the Add User button.
   - Add a modal component with fields: name, email, role (dropdown: admin, staff, manager), PIN (4-digit).
   - On submit, call: `await supabase.rpc('create_staff_user', { name, email, role, pin })`.
   - Show success toast, refresh user list.

2. **Settings: Add Payment Method**:
   - Similar modal with fields: name (text input), type (dropdown: cash, bKash, Nagad, card), active toggle.
   - On submit, call: `await supabase.rpc('add_payment_method', { name, type, active })`.
   - Refresh list.

3. **Expense Tracking page**:
   - Create `apps/admin_web/src/pages/expenses/index.tsx`:
     - Fetch expenses: `api.expenses.list(filters)`.
     - Display in table with columns: Date, Category, Amount, Notes, Actions.
     - Add filter bar: date range picker, category dropdown.
     - Add expense button → modal with: amount, category, notes, date.
     - Summary cards: total expenses today, this week, this month.
   - Add route: `<Route path="/expenses" element={<ExpensesPage />} />`.
   - Add sidebar link.

4. **Reminders page**:
   - Create `apps/admin_web/src/pages/reminders/index.tsx`:
     - Fetch reminders: `api.reminders.list()`.
     - Display in list/cards: title, due date, status (pending/completed).
     - CRUD operations: create, edit (modal), delete (with confirmation).
     - Mark as completed toggle.
   - Add route and sidebar link.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual test**: Settings → Add User → fill form → submit → verify user appears in list → try login with new credentials.
2. **Manual test**: Settings → Add Payment Method → submit → verify it appears on POS payment selection.
3. **Manual test**: Visit /expenses → add expense with today's date → should appear in 'today' summary card → filter by category → verify filtering works.
4. **Manual test**: Visit /reminders → create reminder → set due date to tomorrow → view list → mark as completed → delete.
5. **Edge case**: Try to add expense with negative amount → validation error.
6. **Edge case**: Try to create duplicate payment method name → error toast.

tasks.title: Add Pagination & Date Range Filters to List Pages
tasks.description: Implement pagination on all list pages (products, sales, inventory) and add date range filters to sales and inventory history pages.
tasks.details:
1. **Pagination**: - Update all list page queries to support pagination: `page`, `pageSize` (default 20). - Modify Supabase queries: `.range((page-1)*pageSize, page*pageSize - 1)` plus `.select('*', { count: 'exact' })`. - Create reusable `Pagination.tsx` component in `apps/admin_web/src/components/ui/`: ```tsx const Pagination = ({ page, totalPages, onPageChange }) => (
Page {page} of {totalPages}
); ``` - Pages to update: Products, Sales, Inventory, Customers, Suppliers. 2. **Date range filters**: - For Sales page (`apps/admin_web/src/pages/sales/index.tsx`): - Add date range picker with presets: Today, This Week, This Month, Custom. - Modify query to filter by `created_at >= startDate AND created_at <= endDate`. - For Inventory history page: same approach. - For Expense page (new): already has date filters per Phase 3 task. 3. **URL query params**: Sync pagination and filters with URL query params so filters persist on refresh (e.g., `/sales?page=2&start=2026-04-01&end=2026-05-01`).
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual test**: Go to Products page with 50+ products → pagination should show 3 pages → click page 2 → see next set → click Previous → back to page 1.
2. **Manual test**: Sales page → select 'This Week' filter → sales list updates to only this week's sales → verify date column.
3. **Manual test**: Change page to 2 → refresh browser → should stay on page 2 (URL param preserved).
4. **Edge case**: Empty list on certain filter → should show empty state, not broken pagination.

tasks.title: Implement Realtime Subscriptions & Performance Optimizations
tasks.description: Add Supabase realtime subscriptions for stock level changes, lazy load routes, virtualize long lists, debounce search inputs, and set up query caching.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual test**: Open POS → add an item to cart → in another browser tab, adjust stock level to 0 → wait a few seconds → should see warning toast on POS tab.
2. **Performance test**: Open DevTools Performance tab → navigate between pages → verify chunks load lazily (code splitting works).
3. **Manual test**: Product list with 500 items → scrolling should be smooth, no frame drops.
4. **Manual test**: Type in search box rapidly → API should fire only once after 300ms debounce.
5. **Edge case**: Slow network → stale cache should be used for 5 minutes unless explicitly refetched.

tasks.title: Implement PWA Support & Enhance POS Printing
tasks.description: Add PWA manifest, service worker, offline indicator, and install prompt. Enhance receipt printing with thermal receipt format and store receipt config integration.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Manual test**: Open app in Chrome → check DevTools → Application → Manifest → verify manifest loads, icons display.
2. **Manual test**: Turn off network in DevTools → app should show offline banner but cached pages still work.
3. **Manual test**: Click 'Install' button → prompt should appear → install → app opens in standalone window.
4. **Manual test**: Complete a sale → receipt preview modal → click Print → print dialog opens with 58mm width formatting.
5. **Edge case**: No network → submit a sale → should fail gracefully with error message (offline sales not supported yet).

tasks.title: Set Up Testing Infrastructure & CI/CD Pipeline
tasks.description: Configure Vitest + React Testing Library for unit/integration tests, add Playwright for E2E smoke tests, and set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline with lint, test, build, and deploy to Vercel.
tasks.testStrategy:
1. **Run `vitest`** → all unit and integration tests pass.
2. **Run `npx playwright test`** → E2E smoke test passes.
3. **Manual check CI**: Push to GitHub → Actions runs lint, type-check, test, build → all green.
4. **Manual check deploy**: Merge to main → Vercel deploy triggers → admin web is live at new version.
5. **Edge case**: Failing test → CI should fail and block merge.
